title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§192. Budget to include additional salary

           Each of the parishes composing the Seventh Judicial District shall annually, and at the same time it prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed in R.S. 16:191.
doc_text:
§192.  Budget to include additional salary
Each of the parishes composing the Seventh Judicial District shall
annually, and at the same time it prepares its general budget of expenses,
budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed in R.S. 16:191.
